Title: Kung Fu Panda 2
Writer: Jonathan Aibel, Glenn Berger, Ethan Reiff
Actors: Jack Black, Angelina Jolie, Jackie Chan
Plot: After a year of being the dragon warrior, obesitized but fearless Po (Black) is a hero in China along with Crane (Cross), Mantis (Rogen), Monkey (Chan), Viper (Liu), Tigress (Jolie), and Shifu (Hoffman). But trouble pops out when villian Shen (Oldman) begins chaos. Everybody is ready to fight, but Po is unprepared when he learns Shen was his enemy in his infancy.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 wins & 47 nominations total
